tests.title: An in-document ppe-lint-disable-line directive suppresses the named rule on its own line only, and removing it restores the diagnostic
errors:
Error: TauriPage command 'eval' failed: window.__PPE_E2E__.setEditorText is not a function. (In 'window.__PPE_E2E__.setEditorText("# Geometry of Numbers — Café

A *naïve* introduction to the geometry of numbers.

The lattice points are counted by the following steps:

1. Choose a symmetric convex body.
2. Apply Minkowski's theorem.
3. Minkowski bound

The Basel sum is $\zeta(2) = \pi^2/6$.

> [!NOTE] Lattice note
> 
> Minkowski bounds the points.

![scatter](fig/plot.png)


Inline math undirected: $x^10$


Inline math directed: $x^10$
")', 'window.__PPE_E2E__.setEditorText' is undefined)
